productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's 365 Polo Sky Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue PES single jersey, polyester polo t-shirt with black strips along the short sleevesFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logPerfect for football training exercise sessions and pre-match warm ups, this white Pro Evolution Soccer single jersey polyester polo t-shirt ensures comfort at its best. With this Climacool enabled tee, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics, open mesh and ventilation channels to keep cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. The short sleeves with black strips accentuate your well-toned biceps, while the black buttons add oomph to this stylish tee. Pair it with perfect soccer footwear and you’re all set to rule the game.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
